allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('adapter version:', p.version\); console.log\('peer deps:', JSON.stringify\(p.peerDependencies\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('client version:', p.version\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const v=JSON.parse\(d\); const v5=v.filter\(x=>x.startsWith\('5.'\)\); console.log\('v5 versions:', v5.slice\(-5\)\); const v6=v.filter\(x=>x.startsWith\('6.'\)\); console.log\('v6 versions:', v6.slice\(-3\)\)")
